title: Tools and resources for WHMIS suppliers - Canada.ca
content:
## Tools and resources for WHMIS suppliers
- Acts and regulations
- Classification tools
- Exemptions for confidential business information

## Acts and regulations
- Hazardous Products Act
- Hazardous Products Regulations
- Hazardous Materials Information Review Act
- Hazardous Materials Information Review Regulations

## Classification tools
- Hazardous substance assessments
- Technical decision trees
- Label compliance tool
- Safety data sheet compliance tool
- Product label comparison tool

## Exemptions for confidential business information
- Claims and exemptions – searchable list
- Filing a claim Online application form
- Online application form
- Guidance on the WHMIS supplier requirements
- Document retention requirements for suppliers of hazardous products
- Preparing and maintaining a true copy of a label: A requirement for suppliers under WHMIS 2015
- Joint Health Canada and United States Occupational Safety and Health Administration Guidance – Summary
- Compliance and enforcement policy for workplace hazardous products
- Evaluation of the Workplace Hazardous Products Program 2014-15 to 2018-19
The Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System (WHMIS) logo is a recognizable graphic for the Canadian system. The logo is intended to be used widely to identify informational, promotional, or educational material related to WHMIS.
The logo should not be depicted on WHMIS labels nor safety data sheets.
The WHMIS logo is not intended to be used or perceived as a stamp of government approval of any WHMIS-related materials produced by individuals, groups, associations or firms. It is not acceptable to use the logo in any way that suggests government endorsement of a product or service.
With respect to colour, the WHMIS logo can be printed 4 different ways:
- `1 colour (PMS 293 blue)
- 2 colours (PMS 293 blue, PMS 151 orange)
- white reverse (out of solid backgrounds only)
WHMIS logo, English - High resolution file (TIF Version - 2365 K) WHMIS logo, French - High resolution file (TIF Version - 2406 K) WHMIS logo, symbol only - High resolution file (TIF Version - 612 K)
